docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 78106289) AS TO DEFENDANT GAINS, ALEXIS TOSHI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRUMBAUGH, MICHAEL C. , TRUSTEE OF THE MACABEO FAMILY LIVING TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAINS, ALEXIS TOSHI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1553-15TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94122, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY* ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78114410)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 78106289) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GAINS, ALEXIS TOSHI
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE ($150.00/DAY) (TRANSACTION ID # 78130976) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRUMBAUGH, MICHAEL C. , TRUSTEE OF THE MACABEO FAMILY LIVING TRUST
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GAINS, ALEXIS TOSHI

VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE - UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 78106289) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRUMBAUGH, MICHAEL C. , TRUSTEE OF THE MACABEO FAMILY LIVING TRUST
